description: Current finding does not present data on the closure of the exception set for {1,3,5}. To fully address this concern, we would need explicit enumeration at higher N and statistical extrapolation for asymptotic closure.
action_taken: Current finding does not present data on the closure of the exception set for {1,3,5}. To fully address this concern, we would need explicit enumeration at higher N and statistical extrapolation for asymptotic closure.
